# Colton's Project Launcher

> [cite_start]A public retro-styled game catalog and portfolio project by Colton Bennett based out of Waukesha, WI[cite: 165, 170]. [cite_start]This page serves as a centralized hub for current project management, classic games, and development updates[cite: 165].

## Recent Announcements & Site Status
- [cite_start]**Platform Migration**: Moved repository from OneCompiler to GitHub for easier management and deployment after encountering the 'Scunthorpe Problem'[cite: 177]. [cite_start]Please note that local browser storage data from OneCompiler could not be transferred[cite: 177, 178].
- [cite_start]**Styling**: As of June 10, 2026, the entire portal features a retro 90's GeoCities-inspired layout[cite: 179, 180].
- [cite_start]**Feedback**: Suggestions, feedback, and project ideas can be submitted directly via email to coltjbennett@gmail.com[cite: 181].

---

## Featured Project

### Ghengis Khan Simulator
- [cite_start]**URL**: [ghengis.html](ghengis.html) 
- [cite_start]**Status**: NEW!!! [cite: 199, 202]
- [cite_start]**Type**: Simulation 
- [cite_start]**Tags**: War, Historical, Under development 
- **Description**: Become the legendary Mongol leader and lead the Mongol Horde to conquer China! [cite_start]Use strategic placements to ensure your victory! [cite: 202, 203] [cite_start]Recent updates include level select options, unit model accuracy fixes, and secret content unlocked after level 100[cite: 176].

---

## Active & Complete Projects

### Pixel Ops
- [cite_start]**URL**: [pixel-ops.html](pixel-ops.html) 
- [cite_start]**Status**: Complete [cite: 199, 201]
- [cite_start]**Type**: FPS 
- [cite_start]**Tags**: Shooter, Military 
- **Description**: A shoot-em-up FPS across conquered lands. [cite_start]Pick your deployment location and take out as many hostiles as possible using your vast arsenal! [cite: 201, 202]

### MEGALITH
- [cite_start]**URL**: [megalith.html](megalith.html) [cite: 203]
- [cite_start]**Status**: Complete [cite: 199, 203]
- [cite_start]**Type**: Endless [cite: 203]
- [cite_start]**Tags**: Endless, Mobile, Top Pick [cite: 203]
- [cite_start]**Description**: Roll through a void of platforms, collect crystals, navigate changing sectors, and go for high scores in this fast-paced endless runner! [cite: 203, 204]

### City Striker
- [cite_start]**URL**: [city-striker.html](city-striker.html) [cite: 204]
- [cite_start]**Status**: NEW!!! [cite: 199, 204]
- [cite_start]**Type**: Driving [cite: 204]
- [cite_start]**Tags**: Driving, Chase [cite: 204]
- **Description**: The police are after you! Weave through traffic and between buildings to make them crash! [cite_start]Keep driving for as long as possible and your score will skyrocket! [cite: 204, 205, 206]

### Chronostrike
- [cite_start]**URL**: [chronostrike.html](chronostrike.html) [cite: 206]
- [cite_start]**Status**: Complete [cite: 199, 206]
- [cite_start]**Type**: FPS [cite: 206]
- [cite_start]**Tags**: FPS, Time Control [cite: 206]
- **Description**: Time only moves when you move! [cite_start]Use it to dodge, weave, or just line up a shot in this unique game framework[cite: 206, 207].

### Labyrinthine
- [cite_start]**URL**: [labyrinthine.html](labyrinthine.html) [cite: 207]
- [cite_start]**Status**: NEW!!! [cite: 199, 207]
- [cite_start]**Type**: Horror [cite: 207]
- [cite_start]**Tags**: Horror, Survival, Under development [cite: 207]
- **Description**: You are trapped in a maze with entities that want only one thing: your head on a plate! [cite_start]Shine your flashlight to freeze them, and use your weapons to survive[cite: 208, 209].

### Goblin Hut Clicker
- [cite_start]**URL**: [gh-clicker.html](gh-clicker.html) [cite: 209]
- [cite_start]**Status**: Complete [cite: 199, 209]
- [cite_start]**Type**: Clicker [cite: 209]
- [cite_start]**Tags**: Clicker, Idle [cite: 209]
- **Description**: Click to get goblins and grow your tribe! Buy buildings, sacrifice goblins to science, and conquer the universe! [cite_start]Progress saves automatically to browser local storage[cite: 209, 210, 211].

### Engine Sim
- [cite_start]**URL**: [enginesim.html](enginesim.html) [cite: 212]
- [cite_start]**Status**: Beta Release [cite: 199, 212]
- [cite_start]**Type**: Sim [cite: 212]
- [cite_start]**Tags**: Sim, Physics [cite: 212]
- **Description**: Tune attributes from core cylinder configurations down to specific turbo matching (with active turbo flutter effects) to modify mechanical behavior. [cite_start]Includes sound effects[cite: 212, 213, 214].

---

## Experimental, WIP, & Archive Projects

### Legacy Racing Sim
- [cite_start]**URL**: [legacysim.html](legacysim.html) [cite: 211]
- [cite_start]**Status**: Legacy [cite: 200, 211]
- [cite_start]**Type**: Racing [cite: 211]
- [cite_start]**Tags**: Racing, Tracks, Sim [cite: 211]
- **Description**: Fully functional racing simulator leveraging classic arcade physics, a timed lap counter, and a real environment track layout. [cite_start]Features faux-3D rendering achieved natively through 2D manipulation prior to three.js implementation[cite: 211, 212].

### Warzone
- [cite_start]**URL**: [warzone.html](warzone.html) [cite: 214]
- [cite_start]**Status**: WIP - Buggy [cite: 200, 214]
- [cite_start]**Type**: Military [cite: 214]
- [cite_start]**Tags**: Military, Vehicles [cite: 214]
- [cite_start]**Description**: Pilot notable historical military vehicles, configure lock-on targeting grids to neutralize hostile lines, and utilize automated defensive flares to evade tracking missiles[cite: 214, 215].

### Gang Wars
- [cite_start]**URL**: [gangwars.html](gangwars.html) [cite: 215]
- [cite_start]**Status**: WIP - Buggy [cite: 200, 215]
- [cite_start]**Type**: Arcade [cite: 215]
- [cite_start]**Tags**: Arcade, Top-Down [cite: 215]
- **Description**: Top-down arcade assignment. [cite_start]Move through territory grids to clear rival operations, collect equipment dropped by targets, and reach the exit coordinates to unlock subsequent stages[cite: 215, 216].

### Racing Sim
- [cite_start]**URL**: [badracingsim.html](badracingsim.html) [cite: 216]
- [cite_start]**Status**: Abandoned [cite: 200, 216]
- [cite_start]**Type**: Driving [cite: 216]
- [cite_start]**Tags**: Driving, Physics [cite: 216]
- **Description**: An early-stage, extremely incomplete prototype. [cite_start]Maintained primarily as a playable archive[cite: 216, 217].
